name: Mark Owusu
comment: NxNx Tech turned an idea we'd sketched on a napkin into a working product in ten weeks. They understood our market from day one.

name: Sarfo
comment: Post-launch support has been the real difference. Every bug we've flagged has been fixed within a day.

name: Joseph Mensah
comment: Professional from the first call to the final handover. Our dashboard just works, and our team actually likes using it.

name: Daniel Amankwaa
comment: They shipped our MVP, then stuck around to scale it. Uptime hasn't dropped once since launch.
